puzzle.title: The Pledged Devotees
puzzle.intro: A revered prophet walked among the people, calling them toward the truth. Many turned away in stubbornness, but a small devoted circle answered the call and pledged themselves wholeheartedly. They were tested with doubts and dared to seek heavenly sustenance. Their unwavering devotion became a timeless lesson in faith. Who were they?
clues: We were a small group who rose to support a divine mission in a time of widespread disbelief.
A revered prophet came and called upon us to stand as allies in the cause of Allah.
When the prophet asked who would be supporters of the Divine, we answered without hesitation.
We dared to request a miraculous feast sent down from the heavens to strengthen our hearts.
Our prophet reminded us to revere Allah if we were true believers, yet our humble request was honored.
We were the devoted inner circle who pledged unwavering faith alongside Isa, son of Maryam.

identity.label: Who Am I?
options: The Hawariyyun (Disciples of Isa)
Ashab al-Kahf (People of the Cave)
The People of Madyan
The People of Thamud
The Companions of Talut (Saul)

trial.label: Trial/Event
options: Being asked to be supporters of Allah's cause
Witnessing a ruler's debate with a prophet
Being commanded to spare a miraculous she-camel
Fleeing into a cave to escape persecution
Crossing a river to test obedience
trial.answer: Being asked to be supporters of Allah's cause

location.label: Key Element
options: A table spread from heaven (Mawlidah)
The great Ark on flood waters
A she-camel that emerged from a rock
A staff that transformed into a serpent
An elevated palace reaching the sky

outcome.label: Outcome
options: We became steadfast and triumphant believers
We were destroyed by a punishment from above
We were drowned in a mighty flood
We slept in a cave for hundreds of years
We were barred from entering the holy land
outcome.answer: We became steadfast and triumphant believers

puzzle.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ كُونُوٓا۟ أَنصَارَ ٱللَّهِ كَمَا قَالَ عِيسَى ٱبْنُ مَرْيَمَ لِلْحَوَارِيِّـۧنَ مَنْ أَنصَارِىٓ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ ۖ قَالَ ٱلْحَوَارِيُّونَ نَحْنُ أَنصَارُ ٱللَّهِ ۖ فَـَٔامَنَت طَّآئِفَةٌۭ مِّنۢ بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ وَكَفَرَت طَّآئِفَةٌۭ ۖ فَأَيَّدْنَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ عَلَىٰ عَدُوِّهِمْ فَأَصْبَحُوا۟ ظَـٰهِرِينَ
puzzle.verse: O you who have believed, be supporters of Allāh, as when Jesus, the son of Mary, said to the disciples, "Who are my supporters for Allāh?" The disciples said, "We are supporters of Allāh." And a faction of the Children of Israel believed and a faction disbelieved. So We supported those who believed against their enemy, and they became dominant. (61:14)
